# tg_cluster_services_v2_upgrade (Resource)

Trigger the V1→V2 services config upgrade on a cluster. One-shot — Terraform destroy is a no-op (the upgrade is irreversible per the API).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Triggers the one-time V1 → V2 services config upgrade for a cluster.
# Destroy is a no-op — the upgrade is irreversible per the API.
resource "tg_cluster_services_v2_upgrade" "hq" {
  cluster_fqdn = "hq.example.test"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_fqdn` (String) cluster_fqdn to upgrade.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
